name: GlobalLogic
description: Two stacks of metallic cards animated with a custom diagonal-bend vertex shader. The cards flex in a synchronized wave while the camera orbits with variable speed. Dramatic orange and red point lights create depth against a white fog background.
reason: This project was created for GlobalLogic to showcase their brand in a visually engaging way instead of a static image.

name: N-IX Branding Live Background
description: A visualization of 1,000 metallic spheres (InstancedMesh) that morph between seven geometric shapes — circle, cube, sphere, Perlin-noise terrain, and DNA helix. Features a live procedural background shader with an animated studio hotspot, orbiting colored lights, per-sphere blinking, and full GUI controls for animation, material, and camera.
reason: On the N-IX website, was used 512 images in the dom! To make animation more efficient, I created a live background with 1,000 spheres that morph between seven geometric shapes. The background is procedurally generated and animated in real-time.
